case_title: PHILLIPS, STEPHANIE vs. SHERCK, THOMAS L. DBA THE CAFE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILLIPS, STEPHANIE AS TO DEFENDANT SHERCK, THOMAS L. DBA THE CAFE
